trojan_horse_containment.nlp_justification: Ambassador Ellis has influence=100 and avg betrayal=57%. High influence makes them appear essential; high betrayal makes them structurally unreliable.
trojan_horse_containment.containment_strategy: Do NOT openly exclude Ambassador Ellis — this creates a hostile actor. (1) Assign a symbolic committee role with no real power. (2) Withhold classified proposal details. (3) Build a parallel alliance with their rivals to maintain majority even if they defect.

negotiation_log.nlp_justification: 'Too costly' maps to the 'Fiscal Concerns' semantic cluster [Danger: HIGH]. Counter-deal targets this root cause directly.
negotiation_log.counter_deal: Propose a phased budget rollout. Offer to cap immediate spending to 70% of the original estimate, with a formal spending review checkpoint after 6 months. Proposed budget reduction: $2,940,000 (from $4,200,000).

negotiation_log.nlp_justification: 'Fiscal concerns' maps to the 'Fiscal Concerns' semantic cluster [Danger: HIGH]. Counter-deal targets this root cause directly.
negotiation_log.counter_deal: Propose a phased budget rollout. Offer to cap immediate spending to 70% of the original estimate, with a formal spending review checkpoint after 6 months. Proposed budget reduction: $nan (from $nan).

negotiation_log.nlp_justification: 'Scope unclear' maps to the 'Scope / Clarity Concerns' semantic cluster [Danger: MEDIUM]. Counter-deal targets this root cause directly.
negotiation_log.counter_deal: Offer a formal Amendment Clause. Propose a smaller pilot program limited to one region or department first. Invite Councilor Blake to co-author the refined scope document.

negotiation_log.nlp_justification: 'Security risk' maps to the 'Security / Risk Concerns' semantic cluster [Danger: CRITICAL]. Counter-deal targets this root cause directly.
negotiation_log.counter_deal: Propose an independent security audit by a neutral third-party committee before full implementation. Offer Senator Aria a seat on the oversight panel — converting an adversary into a co-owner of risk mitigation.

negotiation_log.nlp_justification: 'Overreach' maps to the 'Scope / Clarity Concerns' semantic cluster [Danger: MEDIUM]. Counter-deal targets this root cause directly.
negotiation_log.counter_deal: Offer a formal Amendment Clause. Propose a smaller pilot program limited to one region or department first. Invite Minister Chen to co-author the refined scope document.

negotiation_log.nlp_justification: 'Procedural issues' maps to the 'Procedural Concerns' semantic cluster [Danger: LOW]. Counter-deal targets this root cause directly.
negotiation_log.counter_deal: Propose a formal deferral to the next scheduled session with a guaranteed agenda slot. Offer Ambassador Ellis the role of Procedure Chair for the review committee.
